title: Alyxia scandens
taxonomy: Alyxia scandens is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and Australia. The plant is classified under the genus Alyxia, which belongs to the family Apocynaceae. intro: Alyxia scandens, also known as the "Papuan althaea," is a climbing plant native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia.
